summary: During the World Cup final match between Argentina and France, Angel Di Maria scored a remarkable goal, bringing Argentina's lead to 2-0. The goal was highlighted by a beautiful assist from Lionel Messi, showcasing Argentina's dominance in the game as France struggled to respond.
facts: Angel Di Maria scored the second goal for Argentina during the World Cup final against France at 15:36:48 on December 18, 2022. The goal was set up by a pass from Lionel Messi, contributing to Argentina's 2-0 lead over France. Many viewers praised Di Maria's performance, calling his goal a "thing of beauty" and highlighting Argentina's impressive play throughout the match.
